goal: Add a side-effect-free audit authority builder that authorizes memory cache audit export permit consume execution receipt record audit artifacts without writing files, durable state, audits, or external actions.
scope_out: Do not write audits, perform durable receipt writes, consume permits, write files, call providers, call DB, call GitHub, change package files, workflows, deployment files, or write runtime artifacts.
claims: Memory cache audit export consume execution receipt record audit preflight artifacts can be authorized without writing an audit or export file.
Audit authority id, authorized-by ref, and expiry ref are required.
Audit writes, file writes, external actions, permit consumption, and durable persistence remain false.
assumptions: Actual audit/export persistence requires a later task lock.
dod: Ready, missing audit authority id, and blocked preflight cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, diff-check, and full builder tests pass.
stop_conditions: Audit write, durable receipt write, permit consumption, file write, external calls, DB, GitHub, package, workflow, deployment, or runtime write changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-160 produced side-effect-free memory cache audit export consume execution receipt record audit preflight artifacts.
